title: If I Had a Million Dollars
description: Second Conditional — hypothetical situations. If I had… I would… Each character dreams their own impossible dream.
summary_pt_br: Segunda condicional (hipotéticas/irreais): IF + past simple, subject + WOULD + base verb. Erros comuns para brasileiros: usar 'will' no IF ('if I will have' — errado), não usar 'were' no lugar de 'was' no formal ('if I WERE you').

scenes.text_en:
Mr. Kumar asked: 'If you HAD a million dollars, what WOULD you do?'
'I'd buy the best surfboard money can buy,' Bia said,
'and I'd rent a house in Hawaii for a year.'
scenes.text_pt:
Mr. Kumar perguntou: 'Se VOCÊS TIVESSEM um milhão de dólares, o que FARIAM?'
'Compraria a melhor prancha do mundo,' disse a Bia,
'e alugaria uma casa no Havaí por um ano inteiro.'

scenes.text_en:
Rafa laughed: 'I'D OPEN Tropical Bites in Orlando tomorrow.
I'D SERVE tacos to a thousand people a day. Not borrow.'
Joca said: 'I'd quit my job. I'd build my own app.'
And Dona Lúcia whispered: 'I'd spend it all on flowers — and stop.'
scenes.text_pt:
Rafa riu: 'ABRIRIA o Tropical Bites em Orlando amanhã.
SERVIRIA taco pra mil pessoas por dia. Sem pedir emprestado.'
Joca disse: 'Pediria demissão. Construiria meu próprio app.'
E Dona Lúcia sussurrou: 'Gastaria tudo em flores — e parava.'

scenes.title: Second Conditional — the formula
scenes.body_en: Structure: IF + subject + PAST SIMPLE, subject + WOULD + BASE VERB. Two halves, one comma when IF comes first. 'If I HAD money, I WOULD travel.' Use this for imagined/impossible/hypothetical situations in the present. NEVER use WILL in the IF-clause. And with 'I/he/she/it', formal English prefers WERE (not was): 'If I WERE you...' — a fossilized subjunctive.
scenes.body_pt: Estrutura: IF + passado simples, sujeito + WOULD + verbo base. 'If I had, I would travel.' Para situações imaginárias/irreais no presente. NUNCA 'will' depois do IF (erro clássico). E no formal, use WERE em vez de was: 'If I WERE you' (até 'I' e ele).

examples.en: If I had wings, I would fly.
If she were rich, she would buy a boat.
examples.pt: Se ela fosse rica (hipotético), compraria um barco.

examples.en: What would you do if you won the lottery?
examples.pt: O que você faria se ganhasse na loteria?

items.term: If I were you, I would…
items.example_en: If I were you, I would call her.
I wish I had more time.
What would you do if you lost your job?

exercise.question: 'If I ___ a time machine, I would fix my code from 2020.' (have)
exercise.explanation: Second conditional: IF + past simple. HAD, not 'have' or 'will have'.
exercise.hint_pt_br: IF + passado simples. 'If I had', não 'if I have' ou 'if I will have'.

exercise.question: Complete: 'If she had wings, she ___ fly.'
exercise.explanation: The main clause uses WOULD + base verb.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Depois da parte do 'if', é WOULD + verbo base.

exercise.question: Which is MORE FORMAL?
options: If I was you, I would leave
If I were you, I would leave
If I am you, I will leave
If I be you, I would leave
exercise.explanation: Formal English uses WERE for all subjects in hypotheticals: 'If I WERE you'. 'Was' is accepted in casual speech but 'were' is the textbook form.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Formal pede WERE para todos os sujeitos. 'If I were you' é a forma padrão.

scenes.location_en: Rafa's food truck, dreaming out loud
scenes.location_pt: Food truck do Rafa, sonhando alto

turns.en: If Tropical Bites were in Orlando, I'd visit you.
turns.pt: Se o Tropical Bites estivesse em Orlando, eu te visitaria.

turns.en: If you came, I'd cook the tacos myself.
turns.pt: Se você viesse, eu faria os tacos eu mesmo.
O que o Mr. Kumar diria?

turns.en: He'd say: 'If you go, take Cosmo. He loves a good adventure.'
turns.pt: Ele diria: 'Se você for, leva o Cosmo. Ele adora uma aventura.'

exercise.explanation: Five conditional fragments. Chain them for practice.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Cinco fragmentos de condicional. Treine encaixando.

exercise.question: Complete: 'What ___ you do if you won the lottery?'
exercise.explanation: Standard second conditional question: WOULD + base verb.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "If I Had a Million Dollars". Second Conditional — hypothetical situations. If I had… I would… Each character dreams their own impossible dream. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "If I Had a Million Dollars". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
If I Had a Million Dollars
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'If I Had a Million Dollars'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "If I Had a Million Dollars".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
